title: LAV 3 x Nevakar Wine Glasses Vintage Stemware Goblets 10.75oz/320ml
features: Perfect Capacity: 320ml (10.75oz), ideal for serving wine, water, cocktails, or other beverages.
Elegant Design: Features a classic stem and bowl shape for a sophisticated look.
Comfortable Handling: Ergonomically designed for a secure and pleasant grip.
A versatile glass suitable for restaurants, cafes, or at-home entertaining.
description: Elevate your dining experience with the LAV Nevakar Wine Glass. Perfectly crafted for style and practicality, this 320ml (10.75oz) glass offers a sleek and modern silhouette suitable for all occasions. Whether you're enjoying a glass of wine, water, or your favourite cocktail, the Nevakar Glass adds sophistication and charm to your table. Designed with durability in mind, this stemmed glass is made from high-quality glass, offering excellent clarity and resistance to wear. Its ergonomic shape ensures comfortable handling, while its 17cm height and 7.5cm diameter make it the ideal size for versatile usage. This timeless design seamlessly fits both casual gatherings and formal events, making it an essential addition to any drinkware collection.
